U

ui - Variable in class view.GamePanel
 
UI - Class in view
Class to draw all the user interface screens.
UI(GamePanel) - Constructor for class view.UI
Class constructor to initialize the fonts and some icons
update() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Update method for the game thread.
update(Observable, Object) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Updates playerView with the informations arrived from the playerModel
updateMonster(int) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to move the monster and check its collisions
updateMonsterModel() - Method in class model.Monster
Method to update the position of the monsters (if there isn't a collision) and the sprite number relative to the sprite to draw
updateMonstersView(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class view.MonsterView
Updates the fields of the monster with the values passed by the controller
updatePlayer() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Updates the player's model and checks its collisions
updatePlayerKnockBack() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Manages the player knock-back duration and collisions
updatePlayState() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Manages the updates to do while in play state: checks the bombs, moves the player, moves the monsters, checks the collisions
updateView() - Method in class view.GamePanel
Method called by the controller to call the repaint method
UtilityTool - Class in view
Class with some useful utility tools
UtilityTool() - Constructor for class view.UtilityTool
